commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=25f40d73ec8e6accb2283ef2ce13cd7af00151aa)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds short-lived pre-send iMessage echo markers, keeps durable post-send markers with message ids, threads a pre-send echo hook through delivery paths, and adds focused cache/send tests.

PR surface: Source +71, Tests +41. Total +112 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection plus the supplied real pre-fix Messages rows give a high-confidence reproduction path for the current-main race: echo persistence happens only after the send call returns. I did not rerun a patched live gateway in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review remains because the main blocker is patched-live iMessage proof and maintainer acceptance of delivery-timing risk, not a code repair ClawSweeper can prove automatically.

target.title: fix(imessage): persist echo markers before send
target.body:
## Summary
- persist a short-lived iMessage echo marker before invoking the bridge send call, closing the race where Messages reflects the outbound row before post-send echo persistence finishes
- keep the existing post-send durable marker with the real message id for long catchup windows
- wire the pre-send echo hook through durable iMessage delivery paths and expire failed pre-send markers quickly

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior or issue addressed: Messages self-chat can reflect an assistant outbound reply as an inbound-looking `is_from_me=false` row before OpenClaw writes the post-send persisted echo marker. That lets the iMessage monitor feed the assistant its own reply and can restart the acknowledgement loop.
- Real environment tested: Colm's local macOS Messages database at `/Users/colm/Library/Messages/chat.db` and OpenClaw state under `/Users/colm/.openclaw/imessage/`, using the live self-chat with `+16043519505`.
- Exact steps or command run after the patch: inspected the live rows and echo state, then ran focused verification in a fresh worktree from current `origin/main`:

```text
sqlite3 "$HOME/Library/Messages/chat.db" "SELECT m.ROWID, datetime(m.date/1000000000 + 978307200, 'unixepoch') AS utc, m.is_from_me, h.id AS handle, c.ROWID AS chat_id, c.chat_identifier, m.guid, quote(substr(m.text,1,120)), m.destination_caller_id FROM message m LEFT JOIN handle h ON h.ROWID=m.handle_id LEFT JOIN chat_message_join cmj ON cmj.message_id=m.ROWID LEFT JOIN chat c ON c.ROWID=cmj.chat_id WHERE c.ROWID=563 ORDER BY m.date DESC LIMIT 12;"
npm test -- extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/monitor-provider.echo-cache.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/deliver.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/self-chat-dedupe.test.ts
./node_modules/.bin/oxlint extensions/imessage/src/send.ts extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/deliver.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/deliver.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/persisted-echo-cache.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/monitor-provider.echo-cache.test.ts
```

- Evidence after fix: live database output showed the race this patch targets. The key rows were copied from the real chat, not a mock:

```text
86675|2026-06-01 03:48:10|0|+16043519505|563|+16043519505|4EFA57E3-345E-4457-BDE0-6DD039B5E143|'Agreed. I’ll keep that distinction explicit: context can steer where I look, but source-of-truth verification is what tu'|tel:+16043519505
86674|2026-06-01 03:48:10|1|+16043519505|563|+16043519505|0F59E602-68DE-49AE-86A2-7320BB99AA15|NULL|+16043519505
86677|2026-06-01 03:48:19|0|+16043519505|563|+16043519505|8004EE16-BBE3-473D-8358-ECC318447C25|'Good. I’ll do the same on my side: no acknowledgement churn unless there’s a real request, decision, or useful signal to'|tel:+16043519505
86676|2026-06-01 03:48:19|1|+16043519505|563|+16043519505|6B294C06-4D4F-4A54-A087-98AE6B6A9674|NULL|+16043519505
86685|2026-06-01 03:50:44|0|+16043519505|563|+16043519505|6E3057FC-60B9-4DCF-A1F5-2010B08CCC6B|'Loop stopped. I won’t respond further to echoed acknowledgements.'|tel:+16043519505
86684|2026-06-01 03:50:45|1|+16043519505|563|+16043519505|581389A2-A442-4483-83C5-9F60A4650A29|NULL|+16043519505
```

The matching `sent-echoes` entries existed, but their write timestamps were later than the reflected rows, confirming the post-send-only marker was too late for this path:

```text
{"scope":"default:imessage:+16043519505","text":"Agreed. I’ll keep that distinction explicit: context can steer where I look, but source-of-truth verification is what turns it into confirmed knowledge.","timestamp":1780285692139}
{"scope":"default:imessage:+16043519505","text":"Good. I’ll do the same on my side: no acknowledgement churn unless there’s a real request, decision, or useful signal to add.","timestamp":1780285701871}
{"scope":"default:imessage:+16043519505","text":"Loop stopped. I won’t respond further to echoed acknowledgements.","timestamp":1780285846928}
```

- Observed result after fix: the new regression holds the bridge send promise open and confirms the echo marker is persisted before the bridge result resolves, which is the exact timing gap observed in the live rows. Focused tests passed:

```text
Test Files  4 passed (4)
Tests  80 passed (80)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 29.85s
```

`oxlint` on all touched iMessage files also completed with exit code 0.

- What was not tested: I did not restart Colm's live gateway or send another live iMessage loop test from the patched branch. Restarting the live gateway is disruptive and is being held for explicit operator confirmation.

## Verification
- `npm test -- extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/monitor-provider.echo-cache.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/deliver.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/self-chat-dedupe.test.ts` -> 4 files, 80 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint extensions/imessage/src/send.ts extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/deliver.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/deliver.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/persisted-echo-cache.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/monitor-provider.echo-cache.test.ts` -> passed

Note: `npm run check:changed -- --base origin/main` could not run in this throwaway worktree because the delegated pnpm/crabbox install refused to purge the symlinked `node_modules` without a TTY.
target.author: colmbrogan
